affiliations.display: 艾奎兹玄有限责任公司

backstory.original: Artificer, entrepreneur, and planeswalker, the gnome Vi hails from the world of Eberron. Seeking to atone for her part in creating devastating weapons for the Last War, she established the Fixers, a business dedicated to fixing problems others deem unfixable. Born with an aberrant dragonmark that allows her to travel from one plane of existence to another, she's brought her genius, warm heart, and love for a stiff drink to many worlds. Headquartered in Sigil, the City of Doors, the Fixers now have offices throughout the multiverse.
backstory.display: 侏儒蔚是来自艾伯伦世界的机关术士、企业家和位面行者。为了弥补她在上次战争中制造毁灭性武器的责任，她成立了“调停人”公司，致力于解决其他人认为无法解决的问题。她生来就带有一个异常的龙纹，可以让她从一个位面旅行到另一个位面，她把她的天赋、温暖的心和对烈性饮料的热爱带到了许多世界。总部设在众门之城印记城，调停人现在在多元宇宙中都设有办公室。

description.original: Vi shoots the closest enemy with her pistol.
description.display: 蔚用她的手枪射击距离最近的敌人。

longDescription.original: Vi shoots the closest enemy with her pistol.
longDescription.display: 蔚用她的手枪射击距离最近的敌人。

description.original: Vi's Cockatrice starts attacking the nearest enemy. Trigger again to dive bomb the enemies.
description.display: 蔚的鸡蛇开始攻击距离最近的敌人。再次触发以俯冲轰炸敌人。

longDescription.original: The first time the ultimate button is hit, a metal Cockatrice appears next to her and starts dealing ultimate damage to the closest enemy every second for 30 seconds. The second time the ultimate button is hit, the Cockatrice flies to the middle of a swarm of enemies and explodes, dealing 1000% ultimate damage to all enemies in an area attack.
longDescription.display: 第一次按下杀招按钮时，一只金属鸡蛇出现在她旁边，并每秒对距离最近的敌人造成杀招伤害，持续 30 秒。第二次按下杀招按钮时，鸡蛇会飞到一群敌人中间并爆炸，对区域内所有敌人造成 1000% 杀招伤害。

description.original: Vi buffs Neutral Champions by the number of Good Champions surrounding each of them.
description.display: 蔚根据每个中立勇士周围的善良勇士数量，为该中立勇士提供增益。

description.original: Vi gets bored if there aren't enough enemies to attack, her sass reduces the time between enemy waves.
description.display: 如果没有足够的敌人可以攻击，蔚会感到厌烦，她的出言不逊会缩短每波敌人刷新的间隔。

conditions.desc: Evil and Neutral (Good/Evil axis) Champions' damage is increased by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Good, Acquisitions Incorporated, or "C" Team Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
Good and Neutral (Good/Evil axis) Champions' damage is increased by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Good, Acquisitions Incorporated, or "C" Team Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
Neutral (Good/Evil axis) Champions' damage is increased by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Good, Acquisitions Incorporated, or "C" Team Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一名善良、艾奎兹玄有限责任公司或 C 小队勇士，邪恶和中立（以善良/邪恶划分时）勇士的伤害提升 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。
阵型中每有一名善良、艾奎兹玄有限责任公司或 C 小队勇士，善良和中立（以善良/邪恶划分时）勇士的伤害提升 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。
阵型中每有一名善良、艾奎兹玄有限责任公司或 C 小队勇士，中立（以善良/邪恶划分时）勇士的伤害提升 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Vi buffs Neutral (on the good/evil axis) Champions. This can be adjusted by a specialization.
tipText.display: 蔚会为中立（以善良/邪恶划分时）勇士提供增益。你可以通过一项专精调整此特性。

description.desc: Instead of a base attack with her pistol, there is a $(amount)% chance Vi takes out her comically oversized blunderbuss and fires it at a random normal enemy. This instantaneously transforms the enemy into a small glowing crystal sphere that has 1% of a normal enemy's health and is worth an additional $(amount___2)% gold when defeated. When changing areas, any remaining spheres are automatically killed and the gold from them is collected.
蔚有 $(amount)% 几率掏出如漫画般夸张的巨大喇叭枪，代替手枪作为基本攻击向随机一个普通敌人开火。此攻击会立即将敌人变成一个发光的小水晶球，拥有该敌人 1% 的生命值，在被击败后额外掉落 $(amount___2)% 金币。改变区域时，所有剩余的球体都自动被击杀，并收集它们的金币。

If there are $(max_monsters) or fewer enemies on screen, Vi waits impatiently instead of attacking with her base attack, and there is a $(amount)% chance that the second monster in each wave will spawn alongside the first one.
如果画面上的敌人少于等于 $(max_monsters)，蔚会不耐烦地等待，而不是使用基本攻击，且每一波中的第二个怪物有 $(amount)% 几率刷新在第一个怪物旁边。

tipText.original: Vi increases the rate at which enemies spawn if you're able to kill them quickly.
tipText.display: 如果你能够快速消灭敌人，蔚会增加他们的刷新速度。

description.desc: Vi gains $(stacks_per_second) Sass stack for each second she spends impatiently waiting. A Good Example is increased by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Sass stack, stacking multiplicatively. Sass stacks are capped at $(max_stack_mult___2) times the highest area unlocked in the current adventure.
蔚每有一秒不耐烦地等待，就获得 $(stacks_per_second) 层“出言不逊”堆叠。每有一层“出言不逊”，“善良榜样”就提升 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。“出言不逊”的堆叠上限为当前冒险中已解锁的最高区域的 $(max_stack_mult___2) 倍。
Evil Champions also benefit from A Good Example's damage increase.
邪恶勇士也可获得“善良榜样”的伤害增益。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的邪恶勇士数量：$num_stacks___2

specializationDescription.original: Vi decides to work with Evil Champions. Maybe they can be redeemed.
specializationDescription.display: 蔚决定和邪恶勇士合作。也许他们可以被救赎。

description.desc: Good Champions also benefit from A Good Example's damage increase.
善良勇士也可获得“善良榜样”的伤害增益。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的善良勇士数量：$num_stacks___2

specializationDescription.original: Vi decides to work with Good Champions, even though they're already pretty good.
specializationDescription.display: 蔚决定和善良勇士合作，即便他们已经很善良了。

name.original: A Nudge In The Right Direction

description.desc: Increases the effect of A Good Example by $(amount)%.
使“善良榜样”的效果提高 $(amount)%。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的中立勇士数量：$num_stacks___2

specializationName.original: A Nudge In The Right Direction

specializationDescription.original: Vi keeps working with Neutral Champions, but works a little harder.
specializationDescription.display: 蔚继续和中立勇士合作，但她会付出更多努力。

description.desc: Increases the amount of gold dropped by Crystal Spheres by $(amount)%.
使“水晶球”掉落的金币提高 $(amount)%。
Increases Vi's chance of using her blunderbuss by $(amount)%.
蔚使用喇叭枪的几率提高 $(amount)%。

description.original: I figure I have a duty to preserve the multiverse.
description.display: 我想我有责任保护多元宇宙。

description.original: Honey, let me show you how it's done.
description.display: 亲爱的，让我来教教你吧。

description.original: That's gonna come in handy.
description.display: 那东西会派上用场的。

description.original: I make my own luck.
description.display: 我靠的是自己的运气。

description.original: At my age, I've got a lot to make up for.
description.display: 在我这个年纪，我有很多东西要弥补。

description.original: You need to think about the bigger picture, sweetie.
description.display: 亲爱的，你需要从大局出发。

description.original: I'm gonna just pop you over a universe for a minute.
description.display: 我会让你环游宇宙一分钟。

effects.description: Increases the gold dropped by Vi's Catch and Release ability by $amount%

description.original: I've been doing this longer than you've been alive, honey.
description.display: 亲爱的，我吃的盐比你吃的饭都多。

description.original: It's never too late to do the right thing.
description.display: 做正确的事永远不会太晚。

description.original: Try not to mess this up, honey.
description.display: 别把这玩意给搞砸了，宝贝。

effects.description: Increases the gold dropped by Vi's Catch and Release ability by $amount%

description.original: Honey, I can do this all day.
description.display: 亲爱的，我可以口吐芬芳一整天。

description.original: Honey, you've got to ask yourself one question...
description.display: 亲爱的，你得问自己一个问题......

effects.description: Increases the chance that Vi activates her Catch and Release ability by $amount%

description.original: Hang on, I'll defeat you in just a moment.
description.display: 稍等，我马上就打败你。

effects.description: Increases the chance that Vi activates her Catch and Release ability by $amount%

description.original: This is the last time...
description.display: 这是最后一次了……

description.original: When you look this good, people will do just about anything for you.
description.display: 当你这么好看时，人们会为你做任何事的。

description.original: Made 'em myself.
description.display: 我亲手做的。

name.display: 超级充能左轮手枪 1.0 版

description.original: It's still not giving me what I want. Maybe I reverse the dragonshard...
description.display: 我想要的它还是给不了我。也许我应该把龙晶倒过来......

description.original: Honey, I don't think you can handle these.
description.display: 亲爱的，我不认为你能处理这些。

name.display: 超级充能左轮手枪 3.2 版

description.original: You figure out some exciting stuff when you iterate.
description.display: 升级这个的时候，你会发现一些令人兴奋的东西。

description.original: We've been through quite a lot, me and this scarf.
description.display: 我们经历了很多，我和这条围巾。

description.original: Aura has a habit of working its claws in the weave when it's nervous.
description.display: 阿巫那有一个习惯，当它紧张的时候，它的爪子会下意识编些东西。

description.original: Oh, this old thing?
description.display: 哦，这件旧衣服？

description.original: I get this out for special occasions.
description.display: 在特殊场合我会把这个拿出来。

description.original: You've never seen anything like this.
description.display: 你从没见过这样的东西。

description.original: Time to get to work, Crispy!
description.display: 该工作了，崔斯皮！

description.original: Sometimes, sweetie, all I've got to see is the whites of their eyes.
description.display: 有时候，亲爱的，我所能看到的只是他们的眼白。

description.original: It's souped-up and very roomy. Isn't that right, Crispy?
description.display: 它加大了威力，口径很大。不是这样吗，崔斯皮？

description.original: Helps me think.
description.display: 帮助我思考。

description.original: Sometimes you stop the multiverse unwinding, and you need to make a toast.
description.display: 有时你会停止多元宇宙的展开，然后你需要来一杯。

description.original: Before you tell me what's gone wrong now, let me mix a drink.
description.display: 在你告诉我出了什么问题之前，让我调一杯饮料。

description.original: Can I get you a drink? Honey, it's got everything.
description.display: 想要喝点什么吗？亲爱的，这里什么都有。

description.original: And this burn is from when I mixed Khyber shards and sovereign glue.
description.display: 这是我把凯博尔碎片和至尊胶混合在一起时的灼伤。

description.original: Working with these reagents, you only forget your heavy apron once.
description.display: 使用这些试剂时，你只有一次机会忘记穿那条沉重的围裙。

description.original: I'm ready for anything.
description.display: 我准备好了一切。

description.original: Your basic apron acts as a barrier. This one's proactive.
description.display: 你的基本围裙一般都作为屏障使用。而这个是主动出击的那种。

description.original: They do the job. And I look good doing it.
description.display: 它们能用。看来我做得还不错。

description.original: I once saw a cocky young artificer lose an eye to a dragonshard. Bless his heart.
description.display: 我曾经看到一个自大的年轻机关术士，被一块龙晶弄瞎了一只眼睛。愿神保佑他。

description.original: One set to wear for doing detail work; one set for blasting extraplanar horrors.
description.display: 一套用于做细致工作，一套用于抵御爆破。

description.original: These've got special filters. Good for welding AND seeing into the ethereal plane.
description.display: 它们带有特殊的滤镜，适合焊接和观察虚幻的位面。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Female Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Gnome Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a INT score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Ranged Champion in the formation

character_sheet_details.backstory: Artificer, entrepreneur, and planeswalker, the gnome Vi hails from the world of Eberron. Seeking to atone for her part in creating devastating weapons for the Last War, she established the Fixers, a business dedicated to fixing problems others deem unfixable. Born with an aberrant dragonmark that allows her to travel from one plane of existence to another, she's brought her genius, warm heart, and love for a stiff drink to many worlds. Headquartered in Sigil, the City of Doors, the Fixers now have offices throughout the multiverse.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Vi is a Speed champion capable of decreasing the time between waves of enemies

original.name: Well-worn Scarf
original.description: We've been through quite a lot, me and this scarf.

display.name: 磨损的围巾
display.description: 我们经历了很多，我和这条围巾。

original.name: Sentimental Shawl
original.description: Aura has a habit of working its claws in the weave when it's nervous.

display.name: 善感的披巾
display.description: 阿巫那有一个习惯，当它紧张的时候，它的爪子会下意识编些东西。

original.name: Dapper Stole
original.description: Oh, this old thing?

display.name: 时髦披肩
display.description: 哦，这件旧衣服？

original.name: Glamourous Neckwear
original.description: I get this out for special occasions.

display.name: 性感领饰
display.description: 在特殊场合我会把这个拿出来。

original.name: Experimental Hardware
original.description: You've never seen anything like this.

display.name: 实验工具
display.description: 你从没见过这样的东西。

original.name: Cockatrice Launcher
original.description: Time to get to work, Crispy!

display.name: 鸡蛇发射器
display.description: 该工作了，崔斯皮！

original.name: The Big Gun
original.description: Sometimes, sweetie, all I've got to see is the whites of their eyes.

display.name: 大枪
display.description: 有时候，亲爱的，我所能看到的只是他们的眼白。

original.name: Eldritch Blunderbuss
original.description: It's souped-up and very roomy. Isn't that right, Crispy?

display.name: 魔能喇叭枪
display.description: 它加大了威力，口径很大。不是这样吗，崔斯皮？

original.name: Nip of Something
original.description: Helps me think.

display.name: 浅酌
display.description: 帮助我思考。

original.name: Flask of Sass
original.description: Sometimes you stop the multiverse unwinding, and you need to make a toast.

display.name: 沙士饮料瓶
display.description: 有时你会停止多元宇宙的展开，然后你需要来一杯。

original.name: Back Pocket Bar
original.description: Before you tell me what's gone wrong now, let me mix a drink.

display.name: 后口袋酒吧
display.description: 在你告诉我出了什么问题之前，让我调一杯饮料。

original.name: High Octane Saloon
original.description: Can I get you a drink? Honey, it's got everything.

display.name: 高辛烷酒馆
display.description: 想要喝点什么吗？亲爱的，这里什么都有。

original.name: Work Apron
original.description: And this burn is from when I mixed Khyber shards and sovereign glue.

display.name: 工作围裙
display.description: 这是我把凯博尔碎片和至尊胶混合在一起时的灼伤。

original.name: Alchemical Cover
original.description: Working with these reagents, you only forget your heavy apron once.

display.name: 炼金术封皮
display.description: 使用这些试剂时，你只有一次机会忘记穿那条沉重的围裙。

original.name: Fixer's Smock
original.description: I'm ready for anything.

display.name: 调停人的罩衫
display.description: 我准备好了一切。

original.name: Wearable Guardian
original.description: Your basic apron acts as a barrier. This one's proactive.

display.name: 穿戴式守卫
display.description: 你的基本围裙一般都作为屏障使用。而这个是主动出击的那种。

original.name: Flattering Goggles
original.description: They do the job. And I look good doing it.

display.name: 帅气护目镜
display.description: 它们能用。看来我做得还不错。

original.name: Cat's Eye Lenses
original.description: I once saw a cocky young artificer lose an eye to a dragonshard. Bless his heart.

display.name: 猫眼镜片
display.description: 我曾经看到一个自大的年轻机关术士，被一块龙晶弄瞎了一只眼睛。愿神保佑他。

original.name: Double Goggles
original.description: One set to wear for doing detail work; one set for blasting extraplanar horrors.

display.name: 双重护目镜
display.description: 一套用于做细致工作，一套用于抵御爆破。

original.name: Artificer's Eyewear
original.description: These've got special filters. Good for welding AND seeing into the ethereal plane.

display.name: 机关术士的眼镜
display.description: 它们带有特殊的滤镜，适合焊接和观察虚幻的位面。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Female Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位女性勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Gnome Champions by $(amount)%
使所有侏儒勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a INT score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有智力大于等于 13 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有魅力大于等于 11 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Ranged Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位远程勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
